summary: Script is well-crafted (type hints, error handling, modular design), but workflow critically incomplete per spec. Missing: (1) test harness to orchestrate multiple test cases and run via act, (2) fixture files (fixtures/commits.txt), (3) assertions validating exact output values, (4) required act-result.txt artifact generation. Workflow is single execution scaffold; requirements explicitly demand test-case iteration, output validation through act, and documented results. action/checkout@v4 acceptable but SHA pinning recommended for supply chain security.
